data.title: AI infrastructure stocks like GE Vernova (GEV) predicted a $52 billion revenue by 2028, with a 2026 guidance of $41-42 billion. Analysts praise the stock with a price target of $855 as it's becoming crucial for AI power surge.
data.description: As we enter 2026, the industrial sector is increasingly crucial for high-growth AI infrastructure. Power emerges as a significant bottleneck in the AI build-out, benefitting companies involved in generating, moving, and cooling electricity for AI data center builds. GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) stands out as a leader in this sector, with a revenue target of $52 billion by 2028 and a $200 billion backlog. In 2026, they forecast revenues of $41-42 billion. Analysts, like Oppenheimer's Colin Rusch, have upgraded the stock with a price target of $855 due to significant orders from hyperscalers. The industrial sector is poised for substantial growth, with GEV stock reflecting these positive trends.

data.title: Dow Jones rises on surprise Q3 GDP data. Novo stock surges on FDA approval for weight loss pill. S&P 500 near record high.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase due to unexpected third-quarter GDP data. Novo stock saw a considerable rise following FDA approval of a weight loss pill. The S&P 500 is nearing a record high, with software stocks showing continued growth. This update was provided by Investor's Business Daily, offering live coverage of the latest market trends.

data.title: Law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is investigating uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE) for potential securities law violations.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on December 23, 2025, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is conducting a probe into potential breaches of federal securities laws for investors of uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE). The investigation stems from events on November 3, 2025 involving uniQure. The law firm's website is www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Dickey's Barbecue Pit celebrates 85 years with Kids Eat Free promo nationwide from Dec 26 to Jan 31, 2026. #FamilyMeals
data.description: In Dallas, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit, the largest barbecue franchise globally, is making family meals more economical as households return to regular routines post-holidays. In celebration of their 85th anniversary, Dickey’s launches the Kids Eat Free offer nationwide from December 26, 2025, to January 31, 2026. For more than 80 years, Dickey’s has been the go-to spot for families to enjoy Legit. Texas. Barbecue™ together.

data.title: Vibranium Labs secures $4.6M seed funding for Vibe AI, the first 24/7 AI Incident Engineer.
data.description: Agentic AI-powered incident response platform, Vibe AI, developed by Vibranium Labs is set to expand and strengthen industry partnerships following a seed funding round. The funding, totaling $4.6 million, was led by Calibrate Ventures and Mirae Asset. The efforts aim to enhance the capabilities of Vibe AI and advance its market reach in the sector.

data.title: Prevent Blindness supports National Glaucoma Awareness Month with webinar and resources- CHICAGO, Dec. 23, 2025
data.description: In January, Prevent Blindness will be conducting a new webinar on glaucoma in Chicago. The webinar will provide free resources such as videos featuring patient testimonials and expert advice, fact sheets, a webpage dedicated to glaucoma information, and a compilation of financial assistance programs available for those affected by the condition. The organization aims to raise awareness and educate the public about glaucoma through these comprehensive resources.
